summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Bhaiya AI Phase 3 UI overhaul - backend APIs 100% working, major UI pages (Landing, Dashboard, Chat) working excellently with premium design, secondary pages have loading issues

ui_bugs.component: Secondary Pages (Focus, Challenges, Routines, Weekly Summary, Progress Card)
ui_bugs.issue: Pages show 'INITIALIZING' loading screen instead of content

passed_tests: Backend: All 18 API endpoints working perfectly (100% success rate)
Backend: Authentication with test session working
Backend: Focus Mode, Challenges, Routines, Weekly Summary, Progress Card APIs all working
Backend: Chat with Claude AI integration working (Future You, Brutal Honesty modes tested)
Landing Page: Hero text 'Stop guessing. Start improving.' displays correctly
Landing Page: 6 feature cards visible (Call Bhaiya, Memory System, Daily Challenges, Goal Tracking, 7 AI Modes, Focus Mode)
Landing Page: 6 AI modes section displays all modes (Educator, Coach, Wellness, Listener, Future You, Brutal Honesty)
Landing Page: Premium UI design with proper branding and CTAs
Dashboard: Greeting card with user name 'Hey, Nishanth' and stats (0 streak, 3 messages, 0 goals)
Dashboard: Prominent 'Call Bhaiya' card with phone icon
Dashboard: 4 main action cards (Study, Health, Talk, Focus) all visible and clickable
Dashboard: 5 quick buttons (Challenges, Routines, Brutal Mode, Future You, Weekly) all visible
Dashboard: Check-in card with 'Start Check-in' button working
Dashboard: Goals section with '+ Add' button functional
Dashboard: Stats section showing streak, goals, focus, challenges with progress bars
Dashboard: Navigation with settings, logout, and progress card buttons working
Chat Page: Mode selector showing all 7 modes (educator, coach, wellness, listener, general, future_you, brutal_honesty)
Chat Page: Chat input and send functionality working
Chat Page: Claude AI integration working - message send/receive successful
Chat Page: Mode switching functional (tested educator mode)
Chat Page: Navigation buttons (back, call, clear) all working

success_percentage.frontend: 85% (main pages working excellently, secondary pages have loading issues)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix loading issues on secondary pages (Focus Mode, Challenges, Routines, Weekly Summary, Progress Card) - they show 'INITIALIZING' screen instead of content. Check data fetching and loading states in these components.
